title: Dappankuththu Mettula Lyrics Nannbenda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Dappankuththu mettula Song Lyrics From Nannbenda
Singers: Gaana Bala , Ujainee Rai
Lyrics: Vijaya Sagar

Dappankuthu Mettula mettula
dhammaa thundu lookkula lookkula
oththukuren naaneu unaku
veththala.

Dappankuthu Mettula mettula
dhammaa thundu lookkula lookkula
arrow onnu vittaye vittaye
nenjula.

Dappankuthu Mettula mettula
dhammaa thundu lookkula lookkula
oththukuren naaneu unaku
veththala.

x-oda y-ya koottiko
extraavaa enna serththukko
Karoke aattam aadikko
enmela beat-a pottukko

Mangaatha body structure-u
Madaona skin texture-u
sokkaana gilma posture-u
soodaachu love-u meeter-u

Oru oorukaaya pola
en usura kaaya poda
oru oorukaaya pola
en sorukkula variya

en usura kaaya poda
un udambula idham nee thariya

Murugalaa sutta dhosa
un mudhugu vattaa maesa
naan adikkadi pottaen toss-a
adhanaala pidichen rose-a rose-a

Dappankuthu Mettula mettula
dhammaa thundu lookkula lookkula

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Dappankuththu Mettula?

The song Dappankuththu Mettula is a lively dance track that celebrates joy and festivity, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment.

What is the plot context of the song in Nannbenda?

In Nannbenda, this song is featured during a celebratory scene, showcasing the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of Dappankuththu Mettula?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and Ujainee Rai, both of whom bring a vibrant energy to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Dappankuththu Mettula was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and upbeat compositions.

When was Dappankuththu Mettula released?

The song was released on December 23, 2014, as part of the movie Nannbenda.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Dappankuththu Mettula from Nannbenda is an energetic dance number that encapsulates the joy of celebration. It features lively beats and playful lyrics that invite listeners to join in the fun. The vibrant collaboration between Gaana Bala and Ujainee Rai adds a unique charm, making it perfect for parties and weddings. Overall, the song conveys a sense of happiness and togetherness, evoking a festive spirit that resonates with audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Dappankuththu Mettula from Nannbenda is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the festive spirit with its catchy beats and lively lyrics. The unique collaboration between singers Gaana Bala and Ujainee Rai brings an infectious energy that will get everyone on their feet. With Harrish Jeyaraj's dynamic composition, this song is sure to be a highlight at any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: I am dancing in the Dappankuthu style, looking around, I am yours.
I am dancing in the Dappankuthu style, looking around, I let go of an arrow in my heart.
I am dancing in the Dappankuthu style, looking around, I am yours.
I am adding extra things to the mix, making it lively, putting a beat on us for the karaoke dance.
The body structure is like a mango, the skin texture is smooth, the posture is attractive, love is measured.
Like a village, my body is like a village, my words are like a village too.
My body is like a village, can you understand the rhythm of your body?
Like a dosa thrown by Muruga, I hit it and liked it, rose, rose.
I am dancing in the Dappankuthu style, looking around.
